name: gruve-ai-vibe-coding-demo
description: Full-stack demo covering LLMs, RAG, prompt engineering, AI agents, MCP servers, and polyglot microservices — built for the Gruve AI Vibe Coding Engineer role.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix mcp-server && pip install -r python-service/requirements.txt
scripts.dev: concurrently -n BACKEND,FRONTEND,PYTHON,MCP -c blue,green,yellow,magenta "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix python-service" "npm run build --prefix mcp-server -- --watch"
